title: Baby Doll Clothes for 14-18 Inch Doll 35-45 cm Baby Doll, New Doll Clothes Outfits, Sweet Outfits Hooded Jumpsuit with 1 Coat hanger, New Born Baby Dolls Girls Birthday (Unicorn)
features: 👶【Package Included】This sweet doll clothes set includes 1 fashion doll unicorn clothes (1 hooded onesie + 1 hanger + 1 pair of socks) (doll not included). Soft and comfortable to touch, safe and non-toxic, protect children's health!
👶【Suitable for 14-18 Inch Dolls】Size: 14-18 Inch Doll Clothes,These doll clothes are suitable for dolls whose size is 35 - 45 cm.

👶【Safe and High Quality Material】The baby doll clothes are all made of high quality soft fabric, well made, clear cut, tight stitching, good wearing effect, it will be fun to play with and change them often, which will make changing your child's favorite doll costume a piece of cake kind of fun.

👶【Velcro Design】Our clothes are made of beautiful fabric and soft velcro closure, the velcro design on the back is very easy to put on and take off, kids can easily dress up the Barbie doll. These sweet costumes are lovingly handcrafted for premium quality and durability.

👶【Best Gift For Girls】Our doll clothes can fulfill girls' wishes. Sweet doll clothes set is the perfect gift for little girls! It's perfect for birthdays, Children's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas and fun party favors that can satisfy princesses' imaginations.
description: Product Description Aolso Doll Clothes Accessories for Baby Doll This sweet doll clothes set includes 1 fashion doll unicorn outfit (1 hooded outfit + 1 hanger + 1 pair of shoes) (doll not included) Play with dolls and accessories encourages (role-playing) play in children over 1 year of age and provides an initial stimulus to develop empathy and responsibility Easy to put on and take off There are magic stickers/(glue buttons) on the back of the clothes, it is easy for kids to dress and undress the doll. High quality Made of high quality soft fabric, excellent workmanship, clear cut and tight stitching. Cute pattern The unique patterns on the dolls' clothing inspire imaginative role-play. Good partner With these doll outfits, the doll will have a different look. Your children can spend more time reacting with the doll. Let the doll with beautiful clothes be the good companion of your children. Perfect gift Our doll clothes can meet the wishes of girls. The sweet doll clothes set is the perfect gift for little girls! It is perfect for birthdays, Children's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas and a fun party favor that can satisfy a princess's imagination.
